Relevant durable context: the user prefers repeatable in-repo smoke/eval coverage and is wary of hardcoded/whitelist solutions.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn asks to rerun the previously failing tests automatically, so this is the same active topic and should stay as continue. The next-turn working set still needs the recent test-status exchange plus the immediately preceding implementation context, but the earliest resolved regression-addition steps are no longer needed as raw turns. I pinned the durable implementation direction and user preference from t5-t8, while evicting the older solved block t1-t4.
